llmResponse.agenda_changes: Items pulled from agenda: 10.1 (not discussed; deferred to future meeting). Item 9.3 moved from consent to action for discussion and separate vote.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I'll make a motion to approve. I'll second. All those in favor? Aye. Thank you.

items.intro_words: Welcome by the School Board President, Cecilia Marquez
Are there any changes to the agenda? Yes, it is going to be 10.1
does somebody want to make a motion to approve the agenda
Do we have any oral communication? No oral communication.
moving on to bond program consent Items, again with 9.3 that move to action
moving to item 12 for discussion, 12.1 being first reading and discussion
moving to item 13, consent items. If there are no questions
moving on to action items, 14.1 is adoption of resolution number five
now on to board and superintendent report. I can go.
moving on to item 16.1, information on San Mateo county investment fund
moving on to corresponding correspondence. Yeah, I got a correspondence from
moving on to item 18. Other business possible other business suggested
so moving on to board meeting calendar. Are there any changes
